text:
Author's Note

Translation

These characters I've just been kind of drawing for the dustjacket covers of each volume.
By the time I realized, they were completely composed of "characters who made it alive until the final arc".

(Translator's Note: Text in the image says "Forgot to draw Hughes and Lust... but I guess it turned out alright?)

Chapters Included

Chapter 88 "The Understanding Between Father and Son" (親子の情 Oyako no Jō)
Chapter 89 "Soldier's Return" (戦士の旗艦 Senshi no Kikan)
Chapter 90 "Army of Immortals" (不死の軍団 Fushi no Gundan)
Chapter 91 "A Reunion of Alchemists" (賢者の再会 Kenja no Saikai)

Synopsis

From the back of the volume: 

"Having consumed Gluttony's powers, Pride may now be too much to handle Ed and his allies. Their only chance could be the help of Al and Hohenheim, but will Ed trust his estranged father long enough for their plan to work? And back at Central City, Mustang and his team have started their attack. But does the army have a dangerous trick up its sleeve...?"

Spine

Outside Cover

Sloth

Several Central Command leaders, including Gardner
Several Ishvalans (killed by Solf J. Kimblee)
